visual_description: The audio opens with a low, pulsing electronic beat that creates a tense and focused atmosphere. A close-up shot focuses on a man with dark hair, wearing large black headphones and a light-colored collared shirt. He is looking down with a focused expression, as if concentrating on a task. The setting is dark, suggesting an office or a control room at night. In the upper left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are visible. The camera cuts to an extreme close-up of a person's hands typing rapidly on a black keyboard. The fingers move quickly across the keys, which have white lettering. The lighting is dim, highlighting the motion of the fingers. The white Chinese characters remain in the upper left corner. The shot changes to a medium view of a man in a dark suit standing in what appears to be a dimly lit office or control room. He is seen from the side, taking a drink from a clear plastic water bottle. In the blurred background, other people can be seen working at desks with computer monitors. The white Chinese characters are still present in the upper left corner. The camera pans slightly to the right, following the man in the suit as he lowers his bottle. The background remains a busy but out-of-focus office environment
